Enter Access Code

Type the code to open the games and sounds dock.

Games

Developer Mode

Scroll down here, enter the developer password, then choose a game to rename it or paste a full HTML game page override.

Edit Game Slot

No file loaded into the editor yet.
Developer edits are saved in this browser on this computer. Browsers do not silently rewrite local files, so to change the actual page code on disk, load a file into the editor, edit it here, then download the edited .htm file and replace the old one.

Sounds

Sound Developer Mode

Enter the developer password to rename sound buttons. This editor only changes names.
